<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Returns rate groups."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/RateData/rategroups/{customerId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Gets rate groupings used for cost calculations.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

  id={undefined}

  responses={{"200":{"description":"Success. Returns array of rate groups.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"integer","example":3},"name":{"type":"string","example":"OnPeak"},"colorCode":{"type":"string","example":"FF5733"},"distinguish":{"type":"boolean","example":true},"description":{"type":"string","example":"On-peak rate period"},"type":{"type":"string","example":"standard"}},"title":"RateGroup"}}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad request."},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized."},"404":{"description":"Not found."}}}
>
